substep.title: Compose the Write-Up
substep.action:
Synthesize the raw aspect findings ONCE into a focused write-up. Use references/research/document-format body-skeleton — fixed top (Research Question / topic, Summary) and bottom (Open Questions), with the variable middle filled as a simple Findings section organized by topic aspect. No methodology sections; this is a single-domain study.
Discipline: - State facts, not transcripts. Do NOT paste raw child output. - Cite inline: file:line, URL, or thoughts/ alias for every claim. - Record silence as data: a negative finding ships as a cited line. - Open Questions captures what the evidence could not answer, including aspects deferred at the web-approval gate.

check.template-output:
Present the drafted write-up for review before persistence.
[a] Revise (refine sections, dispatch a follow-up aspect) [c] Continue to persistence [y] YOLO
